mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SENTENCE ( MEMBER_ID, SET_ID, FRONT_LANG, FRONT_TEXT, BACK_LANG, BACK_TEXT, MEMO, DISPLAY_ORDER, IS_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{setId}, #{frontLang}, #{frontText}, #{backLang}, #{backText}, #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder}, #{isActive} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.SENTENCE_ID, s.SET_ID, t.SET_NAME AS setName, s.FRONT_LANG, s.FRONT_TEXT, s.BACK_LANG, s.BACK_TEXT, s.MEMO, s.DISPLAY_ORDER, s.IS_ACTIVE, s.CREATED_AT, s.UPDATED_AT FROM TB_SENTENCE s JOIN TB_SENTENCE_SET t ON t.SET_ID = s.SET_ID AND t.MEMBER_ID = s.MEMBER_ID WHERE s.SET_ID = #{setId} AND s.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND s.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND t.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY s.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, s.SENTENCE_ID DESC

SELECT s.SENTENCE_ID, s.SET_ID, t.SET_NAME AS setName, s.FRONT_LANG, s.FRONT_TEXT, s.BACK_LANG, s.BACK_TEXT, s.MEMO, s.DISPLAY_ORDER, s.IS_ACTIVE, s.CREATED_AT, s.UPDATED_AT FROM TB_SENTENCE s JOIN TB_SENTENCE_SET t ON t.SET_ID = s.SET_ID AND t.MEMBER_ID = s.MEMBER_ID WHERE s.SENTENCE_ID = #{sentenceId} AND s.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND s.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND t.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_SENTENCE
FRONT_LANG = #{frontLang}, FRONT_TEXT = #{frontText}, BACK_LANG = #{backLang}, BACK_TEXT = #{backText}, MEMO = #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DISPLAY_ORDER = #{displayOrder}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE SENTENCE_ID = #{sentenceId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_SENTENCE SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE SENTENCE_ID = #{sentenceId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_SENTENCE SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE SET_ID = #{setId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
